summary: Task 10 lands cleanly. MessageBubble/ThinkingBlock extraction, thinking accumulation gate, and D24 systemInstruction wiring all match tech-spec and pass the 5 new unit tests (verified via build/test-results XML). Cross-file signatures (LlmModelHelper.initialize, ResultListener, SafeMarkdown, Contents.of) check out. Module-boundary clean (core-runtime adds no UI deps). Only minor/nit items below.

findings.issue: `var expanded by remember { mutableStateOf(inProgress) }` loses its value when the message scrolls off-screen in the LazyColumn (item composition is discarded). If the user collapses a finished reasoning panel and scrolls up then back down, it will have re-seeded from `inProgress` (false by then, so collapsed is usually the desired default, but a post-stream manual *expand* would also be lost). Not blocking — Phase-3-history note.
findings.fix: Either `rememberSaveable` + a `Saver`, or key the state on a stable message id once D-History lands. Acceptable to defer.

findings.issue: Local name `trimmed` is misleading — `takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }` does NOT trim whitespace; a prompt like `"  hi  "` is forwarded verbatim to `Contents.of(...)`. Works, but the identifier lies about what it holds.
findings.fix: Rename to `nonBlank` (or actually `.trim()` the value if trimming is desired — spec doesn't require it, so a rename is the safer change).

findings.issue: KDoc claims the suite proves `awaitInitialize` passes non-null `Contents` to `LlmModelHelper.initialize`. The tests only exercise `buildSystemInstruction`; the `awaitInitialize` → `initialize(..., systemInstruction = ...)` call site is verified by inspection only. The "Exercises [buildSystemInstruction]" paragraph mitigates, but the opening sentence overpromises.
findings.fix: Soften the opening line: e.g. "Covers the mapping layer that `awaitInitialize` delegates to."

findings.issue: `modifier: Modifier = Modifier` parameter is accepted but only applied to the outer Column as `modifier.fillMaxWidth()`. The call site in `ChatScreen.MessageList` never passes one, so it's effectively dead. Harmless.
findings.fix: Keep as-is (public composable API hygiene) or drop the parameter. No action required.

passed_checks: Module boundary: `:core-runtime` additions (DefaultModelRegistry.buildSystemInstruction, SystemInstructionTest) import only ConfigKeys + litertlm Content/Contents — zero Compose/Activity/ViewModel deps.
Cross-file: LlmModelHelper.initialize signature (systemInstruction: Contents? = null) matches awaitInitialize call-site named-arg.
Cross-file: ResultListener typealias is `(String, Boolean, String?) -> Unit` — ChatViewModel's `{ partial, done, partialThinking -> ... }` lambda shape matches.
Cross-file: SafeMarkdown(text, modifier, smallFontSize, textColor, linkColor) — both MessageBubble and ThinkingBlock call sites type-check.

Cross-file: Contents.contents (used in SystemInstructionTest line 32) is a real accessor — 5/5 tests pass per build/test-results/testDebugUnitTest/TEST-app.sanctum.machina.core.registry.SystemInstructionTest.xml.

D9/AC-14 gate correctness: `accumulateThinking = model.llmSupportThinking && enableThinking` evaluated once per send(), initial `thinkingText` is "" when gated on and null otherwise. Null path hides the bubble per MessageBubble guard.

D9/AC-7/AC-18: ThinkingBlock auto-expands on inProgress transition via `LaunchedEffect(inProgress) { if (inProgress) expanded = true }`; post-stream collapse preserved (no unconditional `expanded = inProgress`).

D24: awaitInitialize now passes buildSystemInstruction(model.configValues) through to llmModelHelper.initialize — non-blank prompt → Contents, blank/missing/non-String → null (5 unit tests verify mapping).
D28/AC-26: extracted MessageAttachmentsRow preserves FlowRow layout (maxItemsInEachRow=5, 56dp tiles, 4dp spacing) — pixel-level parity with pre-refactor code.

Thread safety: StateFlow updates through `_messages.update { ... }` inside updateLastAssistant are atomic; resultListener interrupt-guard (line 161) short-circuits before thinking accumulation, so late LiteRT-LM emissions can't mutate a reset/interrupted message.
Closure lifecycle: `thinkingSb`/`sb` captured per send() are safely no-op'd by updateLastAssistant when _messages is empty or last.role != ASSISTANT (reset() mid-stream path).
Error handling: no new try-catch introduced; existing onError path unchanged. No new ErrorLog components added (whitelist intact).
Memory: thinkingText stored as plain String in Message data class — Phase-3 Room serialization path is straightforward (D28 comment block).
Localization: R.string.thinking_show and R.string.thinking_hide defined in values/strings.xml (lines 88-89).
